data.name: CityImportFailed
data.value: The city could not be imported from the provided data.

data.name: CityNotFound
data.value: The requested city was not found.

data.name: LocationPreferencesNotFound
data.value: No location preferences were found for this user.

data.name: LocationDetectionFailed
data.value: The location could not be detected from the provided coordinates.

data.name: PlanDoesNotAllowTravelMode
data.value: Your current plan does not allow enabling travel mode.

data.name: PlanDoesNotAllowMorePantryItems
data.value: Your current plan does not allow adding more pantry items.

data.name: PantryItemsRegistrationFailed
data.value: The pantry items could not be registered.

data.name: PantryItemNotFound
data.value: The requested pantry item was not found.

data.name: RecipeSuggestionFailed
data.value: A recipe could not be suggested for this user.

data.name: InsufficientIngredientsForRecipes
data.value: There are not enough ingredients to generate recipes. Import foods first.

data.name: RecipeImportRequestFailed
data.value: The recipe import request could not be processed.

data.name: RecommendationGenerationFailed
data.value: A recommendation could not be generated for the given trigger.
